title: Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Aidan (and Richard) were great tour guides! So much history in that tower! They kept it fun and informative, and there’s a great ending at the bar upstairs. ### Smith Tower Observatory Admission Ticket. ### Seattle City and Snoqualmie Falls Half-Day Guided Tour. The hours on the ticket were incorrect. We look forward to hosting you on site here at the historic Smith Tower. It was worth getting the tour and not just doing it on your own unless you just go for the view. We enjoyed our bar drinks and viewings of the city and mountain ranges. It was a perfect day and we are so happy you joined us. Our staff in the Observatory are so happy to have served you and we are so excited to host you once more here at the historic Smith Tower. We look forward to you visiting again, and including you in our history here at the Smith Tower.

title: A Visitor's Guide to West Seattle
content: Explore vibrant West Seattle from our expertly managed vacation rental, perfectly positioned for city adventures and local charm in the heart of Seattle. Nestled between the Puget Sound, the Cascade Range and the Olympic Mountains, Seattle offers the best of both worlds – a striking city with iconic landmarks, world-famous attractions and an energetic vibe combined with spectacular beauty, jaw-dropping mountain views and natural attractions. West Seattle is one of Seattle’s most appealing and scenic neighborhoods with an expansive waterfront, laid back beach town vibe, stunning views of the mountains and city, and easy access to downtown Seattle’s top attractions. ## **Alki Beach Park**. Alki Beach Park is Seattle’s closest beach stretching for two miles from Duwamish Head to the Alki Point Lighthouse. Hamilton Viewpoint Park is a tiny park up a steep road from Alki Beach Park. The main shopping and dining in West Seattle is waterfront on Alki Avenue, along California and Fauntleroy Avenues and at the West Seattle Junction, the heart of “downtown” and a top Seattle attraction.

title: West Seattle Junction - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 ...
content: Things to Do in Seattle. See all things to do. # West Seattle Junction. Tripadvisor gives a Travelers’ Choice award to accommodations, attractions and restaurants that consistently earn great reviews from travelers and are ranked within the top 10% of properties on Tripadvisor. *   Image 9 Likely to Sell Out West Seattle Sunset Sea Kayak Tour (4) Duration: 2h Free cancellationfrom $140   Reserve. This coastal neighborhood is home to Alki Beach, a popular spot for sunbathing, beach volleyball, and stunning views of the Seattle skyline across Elliott Bay. Just up the hill, California Avenue houses a wealth of local shops, pubs, and eateries that capture the friendly, laid-back atmosphere of the area. While visiting Seattle we took the Water Taxi to West Seattle to see West Seattle Junction described as "a clutch of quirky boutiques, shops and restaurants." All this really feels like is the Main Street of a very average small town.
